name: Dog Tax Tee
headline: Paying my daily dog tax, one cuddle at a time
blurb: For the dog parent who knows their pup is basically a furry dependent on the emotional balance sheet.
story: We call it the dog tax: that non-negotiable levy of love, attention, and snacks your dog demands the moment you walk through the door. It's the best tax you'll ever pay. This tee celebrates the glorious financial and emotional bankruptcy that comes with being owned by a dog.
recraft_prompt: Bold retro flat vector illustration of a cartoon golden retriever or mixed breed dog wearing tiny round glasses and holding a clipboard with a checklist, sitting at a small desk. Include stacks of imaginary 'dog currency' or treats nearby. Simple, playful, chunky line work in a 1970s style. Centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic

social.pin_title: Funny Dog Tax Tee for Dog Moms and Dads Who Get It
social.pin_keywords: dog mom tee, dog parent shirt, funny dog gift, dog lover apparel, dog tax humor
social.audience: dog parents who joke about their pup's expensive emotional demands
